message:
fix(cli): address code review issues in config and sync commands

Bug fixes identified during fresh-eyes code review:

config.ts:
- Fix setNestedValue not handling null values properly (typeof null === "object")
- Guard against Math.max returning -Infinity for empty arrays
- Remove incorrect type cast on value in configGetCommand

sync.ts:
- Fix incremental sync only adding new prompts, not updating modified ones
- Now properly merges updated prompts from server while preserving unchanged local ones

search.ts (linter):
- Improved auth expiration handling with clearer user feedback
- Show warning about personal search unavailability instead of silent fallback

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
